title: War in West Asia: The US-Israeli attack on Iran puts more than oil prices on India’s radar of risks to track
description: A flare-up in crude oil prices will worsen if lose-lose dynamics set in. Yet, that may turn out to be the milder fallout of the US-Israeli attack on Iran. Uncertainty hangs thicker over its hard global impact. Think of nukes—and the stake of other countries in US financial and geopolitical authority
